description: Create the Phase 0 baseline document shell for the current Windows Electron Dynamic Island behavior.
steps: Create docs/mac-island-phase0-baseline.md with top-level headings for Scope, Runtime Environment, Evidence Index, and Phase 0 Acceptance.
Add a one-sentence scope note that the document records current Windows behavior before mac migration implementation.
Check that every heading is unique and the file opens correctly from repository root.

description: Create the state specification document shell for review, todo, and visual state behavior.
steps: Create docs/mac-island-state-spec.md with headings for Startup/Auth, Review Rules, Todo Rules, Visual State Machine, and Reminder Trigger Rules.
Add an empty table template under each heading with columns: Condition, Trigger, Expected UI, Evidence.
Check markdown structure consistency and confirm heading order matches the Phase 0 scope.

description: Create the interaction specification document shell for hover, click-through, pointer, and gesture behavior.
steps: Create docs/mac-island-interaction-spec.md with headings for Hover Activation, Click-Through Toggle, Pointer Gestures, and Trackpad Gestures.
Add a reusable behavior row template with fields for trigger threshold, debounce, and recovery behavior.
Check that the document contains no behavior claims yet and only shell content.

description: Create the animation specification document shell for transition timing and motion sequencing.
steps: Create docs/mac-island-animation-spec.md with headings for Expand/Collapse, Mode Switch, Hover Motion, and Reminder-Triggered Motion.
Add an animation table template with fields for duration, easing, trigger, and observed result.
Check that all headings and table columns are present and readable in markdown preview.

description: Create the music takeover specification document shell for playback-driven island behavior.
steps: Create docs/mac-island-music-spec.md with headings for Providers/Inputs, Mode Switching, Playback States, and Degraded Fallback.
Add a behavior matrix template with fields for media event, widget state change, and user-visible output.
Check that the shell is documentation-only and contains no unverified runtime conclusions.

description: Create the Phase 0 migration checklist shell used to gate the move into Phase 1.
steps: Create docs/mac-island-migration-checklist.md with sections for State, Interaction, Animation, Reminder, and Music coverage.
Add checklist rows with fields: Item, Expected Behavior, Evidence Link, Status.
Check that checklist status defaults are unset and ready for later fill tasks.

description: Add startup and authentication behavior details to the state spec from current widget code and visible runtime behavior.
steps: Trace startup and authentication-related logic in front-end/src/components/DynamicIslandWidget.tsx and front-end/electron/main.cjs.
Use browser MCP to run the visible startup path and capture one authenticated and one unauthenticated observation.
Document startup/auth condition-to-UI mapping in docs/mac-island-state-spec.md under Startup/Auth.
Check that each documented rule includes at least one concrete code or runtime evidence reference.

description: Add /widget/summary API contract details to the state spec with request and response evidence.
steps: Call /widget/summary with an API request tool using a valid session and capture response fields used by the widget.
Call /widget/summary with an invalid or expired token and capture the error response pattern.
Document request conditions, response schema highlights, and error handling expectations in docs/mac-island-state-spec.md.
Check that the documented contract can be mapped directly to review UI sections.

description: Add review mode display rules to the state spec with explicit rules for collapsed, activity, and expanded states.
steps: Identify review-mode rendering branches in front-end/src/components/DynamicIslandWidget.tsx.
Use browser MCP to observe review mode in collapsed, activity, and expanded visual states.
Document condition-based rendering rules and fallback behavior in docs/mac-island-state-spec.md under Review Rules.
Check that each visual state has at least one reproducible trigger and expected output entry.

description: Add todo endpoint contract details to the state spec for list, stats, and status update behavior.
steps: Use API request tools to call /todos/stats, /todos/tasks, and /todos/tasks/:id/status with valid authentication.
Capture success and common failure response patterns for each endpoint and note required fields.
Document endpoint-specific contract rows in docs/mac-island-state-spec.md under Todo Rules.
Check that each endpoint row contains method, expected payload shape, and widget-consumed fields.

description: Add end-to-end todo interaction behavior with persisted result verification.
steps: Use browser MCP to toggle at least one todo item from incomplete to complete in the current widget flow.
Verify the corresponding /todos/tasks/:id/status API request and response for the same action.
Check persisted result consistency by reading the updated task state through /todos/tasks after the toggle.
Document the end-to-end trigger, API side effect, and final visible state in docs/mac-island-state-spec.md.

description: Add the visual state transition matrix for collapsed, activity, and expanded behavior.
steps: Extract transition triggers and guards from existing widget state logic in front-end/src/components/DynamicIslandWidget.tsx.
Use browser MCP to reproduce each transition path and confirm actual target state behavior.
Document a full transition matrix in docs/mac-island-state-spec.md under Visual State Machine.
Check that reminder-triggered expansion is recorded as a trigger path instead of a separate mode.

description: Add reminder-trigger behavior details with timed runtime evidence and recovery rules.
steps: Prepare reminder timing conditions through existing settings or data so an automatic expansion event can be triggered.
Use browser MCP to observe the reminder-triggered expansion event and capture visible timing behavior.
Verify post-trigger recovery behavior, including dismissal path and return to normal state.
Document trigger preconditions, expansion result, and recovery rules in docs/mac-island-state-spec.md under Reminder Trigger Rules.

description: Add hover, click-through, pointer, and trackpad threshold rules to the interaction spec.
steps: Trace hover and click-through related logic in front-end/src/components/DynamicIslandWidget.tsx and front-end/electron/main.cjs.
Use browser MCP with runtime observation to verify hover activation, click-through toggling, and pointer/trackpad gesture reactions.
Document threshold, debounce, and recovery behavior entries in docs/mac-island-interaction-spec.md.
Check that each interaction rule includes trigger condition, expected state change, and failure-safe behavior.

description: Add animation timing and sequencing details to the animation spec for all core transitions.
steps: Inspect animation-related definitions in the current widget UI code and list candidate transitions.
Use browser MCP to replay expand/collapse, mode switch, and hover motion transitions and capture observed timing.
Document duration, easing, trigger, and observed result rows in docs/mac-island-animation-spec.md.
Check that every core transition in Phase 0 focus points has a documented animation entry.

description: Add music takeover behavior and fallback handling details to the music spec.
steps: Trace music flow logic in front-end/electron/MusicService.cjs and front-end/electron/MusicWorker.cjs.
Run one supported playback scenario and use browser MCP plus runtime observation to confirm widget state changes for play, pause, and stop.
Run one unsupported or unavailable-player scenario and confirm degradation behavior does not break widget state transitions.
Document event-to-state mapping and fallback rules in docs/mac-island-music-spec.md.

description: Add concrete Phase 0 checklist items and evidence links into the migration checklist document.
steps: Fill docs/mac-island-migration-checklist.md with checklist items covering review/todo rules, visual states, reminder trigger semantics, interaction thresholds, animations, and music takeover.
Link each checklist item to at least one concrete section in the generated spec documents.
Check that checklist rows are actionable and each row has a clear expected behavior statement.

description: Check Phase 0 coverage completeness against the migration plan acceptance statement before Phase 1 starts.
steps: Compare docs/mac-island-migration-checklist.md against the Phase 0 outputs and focus points in 灵动岛迁移方案.md.
Verify that every required output category has at least one completed checklist item and linked evidence section.
Add a short Phase 0 readiness note in docs/mac-island-phase0-baseline.md summarizing pass/fail gating criteria for entering Phase 1.
